summary: Iteration 133: Phase 2A Finance Ledger & Settlement Visibility Layer - Complete verification. All 13+ backend API endpoints tested and working. All 5 frontend pages render correctly with proper data-testid attributes, KPIs, charts, tables, and filters.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. This is a common Recharts issue with responsive containers but does not affect functionality.

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/summary - returns ledger totals (56 entries, net_balance=1650)
✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/receivable-payable - returns receivable/payable breakdown
✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/recent-postings - returns recent entries list
✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/entries - returns paginated ledger entries with filters
✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/entries/LE-0001 - returns single entry detail
✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/agency-balances - returns 5 agency balances
✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/agency-balances?status=overdue - returns 2 agencies (correct)
✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/supplier-payables - returns 4 supplier payables
✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/supplier-payables?status=overdue - returns 1 supplier RateHawk (correct)
✅ GET /api/finance/ledger/overview - returns combined KPI data
✅ GET /api/finance/settlement-runs - returns 5 settlement runs
✅ GET /api/finance/settlement-runs/stats - returns run stats by status
✅ GET /api/finance/settlement-runs?status=draft - returns 1 run (correct)
✅ GET /api/finance/settlement-runs/SR-001 - returns run detail with 6 linked entries
✅ GET /api/finance/reconciliation/summary - returns recon summary with latest snapshot
✅ GET /api/finance/reconciliation/snapshots - returns 3 snapshot periods
✅ GET /api/finance/reconciliation/margin-revenue - returns margin data by period
✅ Frontend: FinanceOverviewPage loads with KPIs, charts, navigation cards, ledger summary, recent postings
✅ Frontend: SettlementRunsPage loads with status cards, filters, table (5 runs)
✅ Frontend: AgencyBalancesPage loads with summary cards, table (5 agencies)
✅ Frontend: SupplierPayablesPage loads with summary cards, table, progress bars (4 suppliers)
✅ Frontend: ReconciliationPage loads with KPIs, charts, latest snapshot, snapshots table (3 periods)
✅ Frontend: Navigation between finance pages via quick nav cards works correctly
✅ Frontend: Status filter on Settlement Runs page filters to 1 draft run
✅ Frontend: Status filter on Agency Balances page filters to 2 overdue agencies
✅ Frontend: Status filter on Supplier Payables page filters to 1 overdue supplier (RateHawk)
✅ Frontend: Back to Overview button works on all detail pages
critical_code_review_comments: All 13 backend API endpoints properly implemented with MongoDB aggregation pipelines
Frontend uses TanStack Query for data fetching with proper queryKeys
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Recharts console warnings about width/height don't affect functionality - common issue with ResponsiveContainer
Finance data is seeded via POST /api/finance/ledger/seed endpoint
All filter endpoints working correctly (agency overdue=2, supplier overdue=1 RateHawk, settlement draft=1)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 5 pages load correctly, navigation works, filters work)

seed_data_creation: Data seeded via POST /api/finance/ledger/seed - creates 56 ledger entries, 5 settlement runs, 5 agency balances, 4 supplier payables, 3 reconciliation snapshots
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2A Finance Ledger verified. Key routes: /app/admin/finance/overview-v2, settlement-runs-v2, agency-balances-v2, supplier-payables-v2, reconciliation-v2. Backend router at /app/backend/app/routers/finance_ledger.py with 3 sub-routers (ledger, settlement, recon). Services in /app/backend/app/services/. Frontend pages in /app/frontend/src/pages/finance/. All data-testid attributes present. Seed data: 5 agencies (2 overdue), 4 suppliers (1 overdue - RateHawk), 5 settlement runs across all statuses, 3 reconciliation periods.
